name: GT-jb-is-order-unit-space
source: HOS Handbook of Operator Algebras (joa-m) @ refs/hos/joa-m.md:2552 (§3.3.10). A unital JB-algebra is a complete order unit space with order unit the identity 1 and order norm equal to the given norm; this licenses applying the order-unit norm formula GT-orderunit-norm-formula to each factor B_r and to B. VERBATIM: "**3.3.10. Proposition.** If A is a unital JB algebra, then A is a complete order unit space with the ordering induced by  $A_+$  and order unit the identity 1. The order norm is the given one, and  $a \in A$  satisfies  $-1 \le a \le 1$  implies  $0 \le a^2 \le 1$ ."
